name: TA-65MD healthy-volunteer registry
summary: Randomized double-masked placebo-controlled TA-65MD registry in healthy adults, using immunosenescent-cell percentage as the primary outcome.
population: Estimated 500 healthy adults aged 45 to 75 years

trial_details.watch_status_reason: Registry text records estimated primary completion in May 2017 and estimated study completion in July 2017, with no posted results in the June 15, 2026 API check; keep as late_no_results until a final retirement sweep decides archive status.
trial_details.expected_results_window: ClinicalTrials.gov lists estimated primary completion in May 2017 and estimated study completion in July 2017, with no posted results in the June 15, 2026 API view.
trial_details.horizon_note: Unknown status and no posted results make this watchlist context, not evidence of benefit.
trial_details.why_it_matters: A large healthy-volunteer TA-65MD trial would be relevant to immune-aging biomarker replication if results appeared, but current registry status only repairs the watchlist.
